title: Salem District – Community Bank Coordinators – 197 Posts
shortInfo: Salem District has published the Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 notification to fillup 197 Community Bank Coordinators posts through Salem District. Apply offline by May 29. Check eligibility, age limit, syllabus, selection process, important dates, and apply offline here.

basic_details.job_title: Salem District Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 197 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Salem District has published the Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 notification to fillup 197 Community Bank Coordinators posts through Salem District. Apply offline by May 29. Check eligibility, age limit, syllabus, selection process, important dates, and apply offline here.
basic_details.organization_name: Salem District Administration, Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission (Mahalir Thittam)

selection_process: Shortlisting based on eligibility & Interview / Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates shall submit applications offline only. Applications should be sent either in person or by post to the respective Village Panchayat Level Federation (Kootamaippu) office where the vacancy exists.
seo_tags: Salem District Community Bank Coordinators Recruitment 2026
